title: Signed vs Unsigned Spectral Ablation: Statistical Analysis with Root Cause Synthesis
summary: Demo notebook for the signed vs unsigned spectral ablation evaluation. Loads pre-computed results from 3 experiments (real-data 8-dataset benchmark, synthetic 6-variant benchmark, CoI estimator bias diagnostics) and demonstrates the statistical analysis pipeline: Hedges' g effect sizes, Wilcoxon signed-rank tests, Holm-Bonferroni correction, win/loss/tie analysis, causal chain construction, and frustration index correlation. Produces a 3-panel visualization comparing per-dataset effect sizes, synthetic benchmark accuracy, and clustering ARI (unsigned spectral vs SPONGE). Uses 9 examples across 3 dataset groups from the mini demo data.
